name: Bank of Changsha Co., Ltd.
summary: Bank of Changsha Co., Ltd. provides various commercial banking products and services to personal and business customers in China. It offers savings products; deposits; consumer, operating, working capital, fixed asset, business, patent pledge, quick, POS, rent, and M&A loans; and credit mortgages, as well as social security services, housing funds, traffic penalty, and living payment services. The company also provides investment and financial management, investment banking, trade finance, foreign exchange trading, and settlement services; credit cards; Internet finance; and mobile, online, WeChat, and telephone banking services. Bank of Changsha Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.
